channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download Unicodia 3.1.1
item.description: Unicodia is free, open source software that can be used as an alternative character map for your Windows machine. The interface contains everything you need, allowing you to easily cycle through all the available ASCII symbols and copy them to the clipboard. Uncicodia is a great alternative to your standard Unicode characters and is filled with symbols/characters that make it useful for a number of different uses. Features of Unicodia In Windows 10/11 — all characters of Unicode 15...

item.title: Download Stellar Data Recovery Pro 12.5.0.0
item.description: Stellar Phoenix Windows Data Recovery Professional is an application that reliable and comprehensive, allowing you to recover quickly and easily the files lost or deleted from internal hard drive or any media outside any other. The program provides with an intuitive interface and no clutter, help you easily get back lost data without modifying the original structure. Stellar Phoenix Windows Data Recovery Professional - Recover lost data Stellar Phoenix Windows Data Recovery...

item.title: Download Blue Iris 6.0.3.4
item.description: Blue Iris is professional surveillance software that allows you to view and record up to 64 cameras (IP cameras, web cameras, DVR / CCTV based cameras) simultaneously and is compatible with the vast majority of IP camera brands. and DVR. Besides. It takes advantage of H.264 video compression that allows you to save hard drive space and reduce bandwidth consumption. Use Blue Iris to turn your existing Windows PC into a full featured professional video surveillance system. Additional...

Sometimes the data on the hard drive can be deleted due to a system error or malfunction. In such cases, use a recovery software can strongly increase the possibility of data recovery and save your important data from the risk of permanently deleted. item.title: Download OCCT 16.0.0.99
item.description: OCCT is a free application designed to benchmark and overclock system components. Test tool OverClock includes 4 different tests to assess the stability of your computer. CPU and CPU: Linpack to test the processor, GPU: 3D to check stability of the graphics processor and power supply combination of CPU: Linpack and GPU: 3D to download power of you up to the maximum. OCCT - Measuring system components The features of OCCT Support is enabled for a maximum of 16 cores. All the tests...

item.title: Download FileMaker Server 22.0.5.500
item.description: FileMaker Server is a software application developed by Claris International (formerly a subsidiary of Apple Inc.), which supports the storage and sharing of custom applications. created with the FileMaker Platform. The FileMaker platform allows users to create, customize, and deploy applications for a variety of purposes, such as data management, workflow automation, and building business solutions. FileMaker Server provides a central hub to host FileMaker databases and make them...

item.title: Download Stellar Data Recovery Technician 12.5.0.0
item.description: Stellar Data Recovery Technician is a other version helps you to recover lost data like files, photos, videos, emails and many other things from hard drive Windows storage media and RAID arrays. Technicians data recovery of Stellar smart detection parameters RAID key and rebuild the RAID virtual to recover data from the RAID 0 array, RAID 5 and RAID 6 faulty or damaged. Software Stellar Data Recovery Technician provides advanced functions for recovering data from servers, RAID 0, 5 and 6...

item.title: Download SkyDemon 4.2.4.108
item.description: SkyDemon is designed to make the flight planning less tedious and more interesting, by bringing the best aviation summary information directly to your reach in real time when you explore the charts. Planning a journey, summaring yourself about potential hazards, prepare for flight and analysis of your path. Direct summary data includes NOTAM, airport documentation and maps, TAF, METAR and wind forecast at altitude. Features of SkyDemon Planning a route with SkyDemon simply by...

item.title: Download Stellar Data Recovery Premium 12.5.0.0
item.description: Stellar Data Recovery Premium is software developed by Stellar, a company specializing in data recovery solutions. Stellar Data Recovery Premium is designed to help users recover lost or deleted data from various storage devices, including hard drives, SSDs, USB drives, SD cards, and more. It allows you to save the scan information to continue the recovery process from the same point, at a later stage. It also has an option to create an image of a complete hard drive or a...

item.title: Download POPcon PRO 4.9.8
item.description: POPcon PRO connects your MS Exchange server to POP3 and IMAP mailboxes. It includes all the features of the POPcon Standard version plus antivirus, anti-spam, and rule-based delivery functionality. POPcon PRO downloads emails from POP3, POP3-SSL, IMAP, and IMAP-SSL mailboxes and distributes them to Exchange or Domino mailboxes based on recipient information found in the email header. The software runs as a background service on any Windows Server version compatible with .NET 4.7.2...

item.title: Download Pazu Amazon Music Converter 1.9.4
item.description: Pazu Amazon Music Converter for Windows allows you to download any song/playlist/album from Amazon Music Unlimited/Prime and save them to your computer in M4A format, MP3, AAC, FLAC, WAV, AIFF. Download Amazon Music songs in lossless HD quality and retain ID3 tags after conversion. Play Amazon Music on any device without the Amazon Music app. With Pazu Amazon Music Converter, you can easily download Amazon songs, albums and playlists to local audio files on your computer, then transfer...

item.title: Download UWPSpy 1.5.2

It allows users to observe how changes affect the structure and functionality of their UWP app. This is beneficial for helping with user interface design tasks during application development. When you select specific properties, the associated elements will be highlighted and any changes will update in real time. How to use: Run UWPSpy.exe and...

You can then select and export them to your computer. So this iPhone data recovery software can also be...

item.title: Download Icecream Photo Editor Pro 1.54
item.description: Icecream Photo Editor is a software application that allows users to edit and enhance their photos. The program provides many tools and features for editing, such as adjusting brightness and contrast, cropping and resizing, adding text, applying filters and effects, and more. Some of the key features of Icecream Photo Editor include the ability to work with a variety of image formats, including JPG, BMP, and PNG, as well as the ability to export images in a variety of formats, such as...

item.title: Download Pazu Spotify Music Converter 4.10.0
item.description: Pazu Spotify Music Converter for Windows allows you to download and convert Spotify music to MP3, M4A, AAC, FLAC, WAV and AIFF in high quality. Use it to download Spotify songs, albums, playlists, podcasts, and audiobooks with a free or paid Spotify account. You can then transfer them to any device, such as an MP3 player, and play them without restrictions. Why should you use Pazu Spotify Music Converter? Premium Spotify users can save albums, playlists for offline playback, but unlike...
